lawn_none.text: Your lawn. Shaggy. Mailbox leans slightly. Down the street: Doug's already got a beer. At 7 AM.

lawn_started.text: A few stripes down. The rest: shaggy. Mower's still warm. Lawn is {{flags.lawnStatus}}% done.

lawn_half.text: Half a lawn. A stark visible line where you stopped. The mown side smells like summer. The other side smells like guilt. {{flags.lawnStatus}}% done.

lawn_most.text: Most of the lawn is stripes. The last stretch sits there like unfinished homework. {{flags.lawnStatus}}% done.

lawn_done.text: Lawn: immaculate. Stripes like a Rothko. Karen's face in the window is unreadable in a good way.
